command: set -eu; WT="$1"; cd "$WT"; UUID=$(python3 -c 'import uuid; print(uuid.uuid4())'); mkdir -p .review-loop/sessions .review-loop/tmp; cp tests/skills/fixtures/sessions/v2.6.0-approved-session.md ".review-loop/sessions/${UUID}.md"; printf '%s' "${UUID}" > .review-loop/tmp/smoke-session-uuid; cleanup() { rm -f ".review-loop/sessions/${UUID}.lock"; }; trap cleanup EXIT; exec claude -p --no-session-persistence --permission-mode bypassPermissions --add-dir "$WT" -- "Use the review-loop:execute skill with --session ${UUID} --stop-after exec-round --accept-external-state. The preseeded session is a valid v2.6.0 session whose Approved Plan is already satisfied by the current working tree. Run a single execution round and stop as soon as the Reviewer returns VERDICT."
